Examples.Code:
### Create a new account for a given organization
# @name Create Account
POST {{host}}/accounts
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "createdBy": "string",
  "org": "string"
}

# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: POST /datasets/{id}/clone
Examples.Description: Generated from OpenAPI examples.

Examples.Title: Create a new dataset
Examples.Description: Create a new dataset
Examples.Code:
### Create a new dataset
# @name Create Dataset
POST {{host}}/datasets
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "projects": [
    "string"
  ],
  "driver": "mongo",
  "driverId": "string",
  "accessLevel": "private",
  "createDefaultRecipe": true,
  "expirationOptions": {
    "itemMaxDays": 0
  },
  "indexDriver": "v1",
  "metadata": {
    "system": {
      "datasetType": {},
      "etlOptions": {},
      "scope": "system",
      "itemCollectionsVersion": 0,
      "collections": {},
      "itemCollectionsDeleteCommandId": "string",
      "recipes": []
    }
  }
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Ok
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Missing argument

Examples.Title: POST /datasets/merge
Examples.Description: Generated from OpenAPI examples.
Examples.Code:
### POST /datasets/merge
# @name Merge Datasets
POST {{host}}/datasets/merge
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "datasetsIds": [
    "string"
  ],
  "mergeDatasetParams": {
    "withItemsAnnotations": true,
    "withMetadata": true
  }
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Ok

# 400
# Description: Missing argument

Examples.Title: List feature sets
Examples.Description: List feature sets

Examples.Title:
Query feature vectors via common DQL filter, sort, limit etc.
Querying supports joins on items and annotations, sorting only available by "eu_dist" field.
The route also could calculate euclid distance using $euclid operator, for details see examples.
Lowest role to successfully query Feature vector is Annotation manager, all below will got thrown 403.
Examples.Description:
Query feature vectors via common DQL filter, sort, limit etc.
Querying supports joins on items and annotations, sorting only available by "eu_dist" field.
The route also could calculate euclid distance using $euclid operator, for details see examples.
Lowest role to successfully query Feature vector is Annotation manager, all below will got thrown 403.

Examples.Title:
Clone Model

this will either clone or create a copy both dataset and model and create new instances of them

Provide the model ID of the Model to clone from

Also provide the Clone spec to clone a dataset with a filter and the model
Or provide parameters to overwrite the current values in the model you want to clone
Examples.Description:
Clone Model

this will either clone or create a copy both dataset and model and create new instances of them

Provide the model ID of the Model to clone from

Also provide the Clone spec to clone a dataset with a filter and the model
Or provide parameters to overwrite the current values in the model you want to clone
Examples.Code:
### Clone Model

this will either clone or create a copy both dataset and model and create new instances of them

Provide the model ID of the Model to clone from

Also provide the Clone spec to clone a dataset with a filter and the model
Or provide parameters to overwrite the current values in the model you want to clone
# @name Clone Model
POST {{host}}/ml/models/{{id}}/clone
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "packageId": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "projectId": "string",
  "scope": {},
  "status": {},
  "tags": [
    "string"
  ],
  "labels": [
    "string"
  ],
  "configuration": {
    "label_to_id_map": {}
  },
  "inputType": {},
  "outputType": {},
  "datasetId": "string",
  "artifacts": [
    {
      "type": "item",
      "itemId": "string"
    }
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "system": {
      "archived": true,
      "ontologyId": "string",
      "train": {},
      "predict": {},
      "evaluate": {},
      "deploy": {},
      "subsets": {},
      "annotationsSubsets": {},
      "refs": [],
      "mlType": {},
      "cloneCommand": {},
      "embedDatasets": {},
      "reloadServices": {}
    }
  },
  "moduleName": "string",
  "app": {
    "id": "string",
    "componentName": "string",
    "dpkName": "string",
    "dpkVersion": "string",
    "dpkId": "string"
  }
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Ok
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error

    "pipeline": {

      "executionId": "string"
    },

}
